title: salacia miqueliana
intro: Salacia miqueliana, also known as Kokum, is a plant species native to the Western Ghats of India, belonging to the family Celastraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antidiabetic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Salacia miqueliana include its ability to reduce blood sugar levels, improve cardiovascular health, and aid in weight management. Salacia miqueliana is often used in herbal preparations such as capsules, tablets, and teas, and is also used as a topical application for skin conditions.
